title: Polling Has an AI Respondent Problem
description: Imagine you’re doing market research to advise a soda company on which flavor to emphasize in its next advertising campaign: regular cola or cherry? title: FG engages varsity dons for AI, skills, digital economy research
description: By Progress Godfrey The Federal Government has positioned Nigeria’s universities at the heart of its digital transformation drive, tasking academia to power innovation for the digital economy through specialised research clusters, aimed at generating homegrown solutions for growth and global competitiveness.
